projectName: Sonic Sphere Amsterdam / DNK Delivery Flow V0.3

tabs.name: War Room
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Project Mandate
data.notes: Single sentence definition: open Sonic Sphere Amsterdam at DNK as a standing, ticketed, operating venue.

data.title: Workstream Owner Map
data.notes: Named owner for each tab/workstream, including delivery, venue, sound, content, ops, finance, launch.

data.title: Master Plan
data.notes: One integrated map of major workstreams, timelines, dependencies, and handoffs.

data.title: Cross-Tab Dependency Map
data.notes: Shows where one tab blocks or feeds another: DNK, capital, design, sound, content, ops, launch.

data.title: Weekly War Room
data.notes: Standing meeting where blockers, dependencies, open questions, and next actions are reconciled.

data.title: Critical Path Board
data.notes: Highest-leverage path to opening: site, money, design, manufacturing, sound, content, ops, tickets, launch.

data.title: Blocker Board
data.notes: Live list of unresolved blockers with owner and next action.

data.title: Decision Log
data.notes: Records decisions already made so the team does not re-litigate them.

data.title: Risk Register
data.notes: Captures project risks and mitigation owners without creating separate gate nodes.

data.title: Launch Readiness Board
data.notes: Single view of whether every tab is converging toward opening.

data.title: Investor / Stoneweg Update
data.notes: Recurring update format for Stoneweg and other capital stakeholders.

data.title: Replication Learning Log
data.notes: Captures what Amsterdam teaches for future Sonic Sphere venues.

tabs.name: Venue
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: DNK Relationship Map
data.notes: Who matters at DNK and who owns each relationship.

data.title: Decision-Maker Path
data.notes: Sequence for institutional approval, commercial signoff, and operational acceptance.

data.title: Commercial Structure
data.notes: Lease, license, rev share, minimum guarantee, sponsor rights, ticket rights, merch rights.

data.title: Site Survey
data.notes: Physical constraints: footprint, ceiling, floor load, power, egress, queue, load-in, acoustic conditions.

data.title: Operating Boundary Map
data.notes: Who owns queue, entrance, threshold, bathrooms, cloakroom, cleaning, security, incidents.

data.title: Access + Load-In Plan
data.notes: How equipment gets from street to DNK to final installation position.

data.title: Heritage Constraints
data.notes: DNK-specific preservation, fixing, floor protection, working hours, and visual constraints.

data.title: Permitting + Fire Path
data.notes: Safety, building, temporary structure, fire, crowd, accessibility, and institutional approvals.

data.title: Draft Venue Agreement
data.notes: Master document for site control and operating rights.

data.title: DNK Comments Round
data.notes: Negotiation pass to resolve commercial, legal, technical, and operations comments.

data.title: Responsibility Matrix
data.notes: Practical split between DNK and Sonic Sphere for all day-to-day responsibilities.

data.title: Signed Venue Agreement
data.notes: Executed contract enabling installation and operation.

data.title: Site Access Calendar
data.notes: Confirmed dates for survey, pre-build, load-in, install, soft open, public open.

tabs.name: Capital
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Capex Baseline
data.notes: Physical sphere, sound, lighting, acoustics, install, logistics, contingency.

data.title: Pre-Opening Opex
data.notes: Team, rent/license, setup, insurance, travel, rehearsals, launch runway.

data.title: Content + Launch Budget
data.notes: Hero show, artist package, spatial mix, rights, PR, assets, previews.

data.title: Operating Runway
data.notes: Cash needed for first months of operation until ticket revenue normalizes.

data.title: Amsterdam Financial Model
data.notes: Unified project model linking capex, opex, ticket revenue, merch, private events, sponsors.

data.title: Stoneweg KPI Set
data.notes: Commercial, operational, audience, press, and replication KPIs.

data.title: Investor Narrative
data.notes: Project-level story: site, star, show, operator, budget, launch date, revenue logic.

data.title: Capital Stack Sources
data.notes: Stoneweg, other investors, sponsors, in-kind partners, presales, private event deposits.

data.title: Sponsor + In-Kind Offsets
data.notes: Gear, cash, naming, hospitality, technical partner, and founding partner contributions.

data.title: Project Entity / OpCo
data.notes: Amsterdam operating entity or SPV for contracts, revenue, staff, tax, and banking.

data.title: Cash Draw Schedule
data.notes: When money is needed relative to design, manufacturing, install, content, and opening.

data.title: Investor Materials
data.notes: Deck, model, one-pager, KPI dashboard, use-of-proceeds, risk summary.

data.title: Funding Commitments
data.notes: Committed capital and partner contributions captured in one source of truth.

data.title: Reporting Rhythm
data.notes: Recurring financial and KPI updates to investors and leadership.

tabs.name: Engineering
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Design Brief
data.notes: What the Amsterdam sphere must be: capacity, feel, sound ambition, DNK fit, installability.

data.title: DNK Site Constraints
data.notes: All physical, acoustic, heritage, power, egress, access, and operational constraints.

data.title: Sphere Geometry
data.notes: Size, shape, seating/standing, circulation, and spatial relationship inside DNK.

data.title: Structural System
data.notes: Truss, base, floor, legs, connections, load paths, safety factors.

data.title: Floor / Access / Egress
data.notes: Floor system, stairs, lift/ramp, guardrails, emergency exit logic.

data.title: Acoustic Model
data.notes: Kierkegaard-style acoustic strategy for sphere, DNK room, and treatments.

data.title: Sound Integration
data.notes: Speaker locations, sub locations, brackets, cabling, racks, renderer, maintenance access.

data.title: Lighting Integration
data.notes: Architectural lighting, show lighting, control, power, data, emergency compatibility.

data.title: Material + Fire Rating
data.notes: Scrim, acrylic, acoustic surfaces, fabrics, finishes, protection, cleanability.

data.title: Accessibility + Comfort
data.notes: Accessible route, seating, ventilation, heat, crowd comfort, staff access.

data.title: Local Engineering Review
data.notes: Local architect/structural/electrical/fire review for Dutch/DNK acceptance.

data.title: Fabrication Drawings
data.notes: Buildable drawings for suppliers and fabricators.

data.title: Installation Method
data.notes: Step-by-step install method, temporary works, protection, sequence, staffing.

data.title: Design Freeze Package
data.notes: Final package that allows procurement and fabrication to proceed.

tabs.name: Delivery
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Procurement Packages
data.notes: Break design into packages: structure, floor, access, acoustics, audio brackets, lighting, tech room.

data.title: Supplier RFQs
data.notes: Send clear scopes to qualified suppliers and fabricators.

data.title: Supplier Selection
data.notes: Choose suppliers based on cost, schedule, quality, experience, and DNK fit.

data.title: Fabrication Release
data.notes: Release drawings, specs, and purchase orders to make the thing.

data.title: Factory Production
data.notes: Manufacture structural, acoustic, visual, access, and integration components.

data.title: Factory QC
data.notes: Dimensional, fit, finish, bracket, packing, and mock assembly checks.

data.title: Packing + Spare Parts
data.notes: Pack by install sequence and include spares, tools, and documentation.

data.title: Freight to Netherlands
data.notes: International freight movement to NL receiving point.

data.title: Customs + Receiving
data.notes: Clear customs, inspect arrivals, count parts, and document damage.

data.title: Storage / Staging
data.notes: Stage in sequence for last-mile delivery and DNK load-in.

data.title: Last Mile to DNK
data.notes: Move staged equipment to Dam Square / DNK at the approved time.

data.title: Floor Protection
data.notes: Protect DNK fabric before build begins.

data.title: Sphere Assembly
data.notes: Assemble base, structure, floor, access, treatments, lighting, and audio interfaces.

data.title: Install QC + Snag List
data.notes: Inspect installation, log snags, remediate, and verify safe condition.

data.title: Handover Pack
data.notes: As-built docs, manuals, maintenance plan, spare list, and acceptance record.

tabs.name: Sound System
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Sonic Ambition Brief
data.notes: Define "mandate of heaven" standards: clarity, headroom, imaging, immersion, reliability.

data.title: Acoustic Survey Inputs
data.notes: DNK measurements and acoustic model inputs for system design.

data.title: Speaker / Amp Partner Shortlist
data.notes: Harman/JBL, L-Acoustics, d&b, Meyer, and other possible technical partners.

data.title: Spatial Audio Architecture
data.notes: Renderer, routing, channel count, object handling, show control, and playback architecture.

data.title: Speaker + Sub Layout
data.notes: Location, coverage, bracket, low-end, calibration, and maintenance logic.

data.title: Amplifier + DSP Plan
data.notes: Amps, processing, matrix, network, racks, power, and heat.

data.title: Renderer / Playback System
data.notes: Computers, redundancy, show file recall, operator interface, backups.

data.title: ADM / Spatial File Workflow
data.notes: Receive, validate, version, render, QC, store, and archive ADM/spatial files.

data.title: Monitoring + Redundancy
data.notes: Health checks, failover, monitoring, spare parts, daily verification.

data.title: Partner Technical Agreement
data.notes: Scope, commercial terms, support, branding, case study, and co-marketing.

data.title: Installation Integration
data.notes: Speaker, amp, rack, cabling, power, networking, and renderer install coordination.

data.title: Calibration Sessions
data.notes: Speaker-by-speaker verification, alignment, tuning, content test, SPL/headroom test.

data.title: Sonic Acceptance Playlist
data.notes: Canonical test content proving the room sounds extraordinary.

data.title: Daily Sound Check Routine
data.notes: Repeatable operating checklist before each show day.

tabs.name: Artist Partnerships
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Anchor Artist Role
data.notes: Specific bankable role: creative anchor, signature show creator, curator, executive producer, or opening-week performer.

data.title: Artist Target List
data.notes: Björk, Daft Punk, Air, Four Tet, plus other serious candidates.

data.title: Creative + Economic Ask
data.notes: What we are asking for, time commitment, creative control, compensation, rights, and upside.

data.title: Artist Deck / Package
data.notes: Venue, Sonic Sphere medium, DNK context, launch plan, sound ambition, audience, press, economics.

data.title: Management / Label Outreach
data.notes: Initial outreach to artist teams, managers, labels, publishers, and close networks.

data.title: First Conversations
data.notes: Exploratory conversations converted into specific artist tracks.

data.title: Preferred Anchor Track
data.notes: Most viable artist/cultural anchor path kept warm and concrete.

data.title: LOI / Term Sheet
data.notes: Lightweight commitment framework that makes the artist attachment usable.

data.title: Opening Week Role
data.notes: Defines whether the artist appears, performs, hosts, launches, curates, or endorses.

data.title: Press + Sponsor Rights
data.notes: What can be announced, photographed, quoted, sponsored, and sold.

data.title: Supporting Artist Pipeline
data.notes: 8-12 credible artists for density beyond the anchor.

data.title: Artist Relationship Calendar
data.notes: Ongoing contact rhythm from pre-launch through first programming cycle.

tabs.name: Music Pipeline
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Existing Content Inventory
data.notes: Everything already available: audio, visuals, sessions, show files, rights docs.

data.title: Rights Status Map
data.notes: What is cleared, unclear, expired, missing, or needs new permission.

data.title: Hero Show Concept
data.notes: Repeatable ticket-driving show that does not require the star to be present daily.

data.title: Hero Show Treatment
data.notes: Narrative, sound, visuals, duration, experience promise, technical requirements.

data.title: Studio Partner Selection
data.notes: Evaluate Oli Morgan / Newgrounds, Hervé / Radio France, and other spatial mix partners.

data.title: ADM / Stems Intake
data.notes: Receive masters, ADM, stems, sessions, metadata, artwork, and approvals.

data.title: Spatial Mix Production
data.notes: Create or adapt show-ready spatial mixes.

data.title: Playback QC
data.notes: Validate files on the Amsterdam playback chain and sound system.

data.title: Artist Approvals
data.notes: Final artist/label approval of mix, show file, visuals, credits, marketing use.

data.title: Rights Agreements
data.notes: Master, publishing, spatial remix, visual, marketing, territory, term, revenue share.

data.title: Opening Week Slate
data.notes: Press/VIP/star/community/public opening content stack.

data.title: 12-Week Calendar
data.notes: Initial operating calendar that can sell tickets beyond opening week.

data.title: 12-Month Programming Map
data.notes: Residencies, refresh cycles, local programming, private events, and special moments.

data.title: Content Repository
data.notes: Secure location for masters, show files, approvals, metadata, rights, and versions.

data.title: Show File Archive
data.notes: Final approved playback packages and rollback versions.

tabs.name: Pre-Operations
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Operating Assumptions
data.notes: Days, hours, shows/day, show length, turnaround, cleaning, tech checks, staffing philosophy.

data.title: Show Schedule
data.notes: Public shows, private events, maintenance windows, dark days, rehearsals, opening week.

data.title: Staffing Model
data.notes: FOH, BOH, technical, guest services, security, cleaning, maintenance, retail.

data.title: Amsterdam GM
data.notes: Local accountable operator for daily venue performance.

data.title: FOH / BOH Roles
data.notes: House manager, ushers, box office support, scanners, queue, tech room, artist liaison.

data.title: Security Plan
data.notes: Crowd, bag policy, emergency support, overnight protection, VIP/artist security.

data.title: Cleaning Plan
data.notes: Between-show reset, end-of-day cleaning, bathrooms, DNK/shared boundaries.

data.title: Maintenance Plan
data.notes: Daily/weekly inspection, calibration, speaker/lighting/floor/access checks, spare parts.

data.title: Emergency Procedures
data.notes: Evacuation, medical, fire alarm, show stop, technical failure, incident escalation.

data.title: Ticket Scan Flow
data.notes: Hardware, staff positions, exception handling, late arrivals, VIPs, groups.

data.title: SOP Manual
data.notes: Written procedures for daily opening, show run, guest issues, close, and escalation.

data.title: Staff Training
data.notes: Train FOH, BOH, tech, security, retail, cleaning, and emergency roles.

data.title: Rehearsal Runs
data.notes: Run full show-day simulations without public audience.

data.title: Soft Opening Operations
data.notes: Invited-audience test of real operations, timing, staffing, and reset.

data.title: Daily Ops Dashboard
data.notes: Post-open dashboard for shows run, incidents, staffing, downtime, and guest flow.

tabs.name: Experience Design
tabs.description: Mermaid-ish left-to-right flow for Sonic Sphere Amsterdam delivery.

data.title: Experience Promise

data.title: Guest Journey Map
data.notes: End-to-end map from discovery to rebooking.

data.title: Exterior Arrival
data.notes: How Sonic Sphere appears at DNK / Dam Square before ticket scan.

data.notes: Line, weather, timing, mood, expectation-setting, and accessibility.

data.title: Ticket Scan Moment
data.notes: Moment where the guest crosses from church visitor to Sonic Sphere guest.

data.title: Pre-Show Holding

data.title: Threshold / Entry Ritual
data.notes: The designed moment of entering the sphere.

data.title: In-Sphere Positioning
data.notes: Seating/standing, wayfinding, ushers, comfort, sightlines, no-phone policy.

data.title: Show Start Ritual

data.title: Follow-Up / Rebook Prompt
